visual_description: A man in a blue and white plaid shirt stands in a hospital room, looking down at a brown leather bag he is holding. He then looks up and to his right, gesturing with his hands as if explaining something. In the background, a woman in a hospital gown is lying in a bed, and another man is attending to a patient in a separate bed.
audio_description: A man speaks in a calm, explanatory tone, followed by a loud, sustained electronic buzzer sound.
